work_unit: ESE-M02: autonomous-loop.sh comment/code contradiction re --max-iterations + missing per-round timeout/max-turns knobs
situation: audit-2026-07-03-006 finding ESE-M02 (status=pending): live main scripts/autonomous-loop.sh header comment incorrectly claimed 'cloudcli claude 不支持 --max-iterations' (wrong flag name; actual flag is --max-turns) and provided no per-round timeout mechanism. Archive copy already contained fix but live had not received it. Prior merged worktrees brought H-005/L-003/AS-EC-007 into live but ESE-M02 was missed.
action: Applied minimal ESE-M02 fix to live scripts/autonomous-loop.sh: (1) corrected header comment to reference --max-turns, (2) added AUTONOMOUS_MAX_TURNS/AUTONOMOUS_ROUND_TIMEOUT env var declarations, (3) updated run_round() to conditionally pass --max-turns and wrap with timeout, (4) fixed stale while-loop body comment. Preserved existing H-005 mktemp/shred pattern. Default behavior unchanged (both vars empty = no limit).
outcome_evidence: bash -n syntax check passed; grep confirms ESE-M02/MAX_TURNS/ROUND_TIMEOUT present at lines 14-20,113-115,126-133,164; opt-worktree.sh committed and pushed to origin/auto/opt-autonomous-loop-shift-1783091217; git diff shows +23/-3 lines in single file.
next_suggestion: All derived_fixes from audit-2026-07-03-006 now resolved (ESE-H01 merged, ESE-H02 merged, ESE-M01 merged, ESE-M02 merged via this case). Set audit-cycle-state.status=cycle-complete next round to trigger new full audit on least-recently-audited project.
